steps.title: Close the interruption
steps.content: The sentence opens an interruption after "that" with an em dash: "through community involvement and scientific study" sits between the subject and the verb "aim." The blank must close that interruption.

steps.title: Match the dash pair
steps.content: A leaves the opening dash unclosed. B uses a comma, and C uses a colon; neither matches the opening punctuation. The sentence needs a second em dash after "study" to resume the main clause. The answer is D.
